titles.title: We're Going Home in the Morning

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We're going home In the morning, We're going home It won't be long

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can't afford to get my lines tangled in these kind of times, So I'm looking nine times Before I make one step, I don't want to be caught In an unconscious state of mind, For I want to leave this earth In the twinkling of an eye.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We are going to slip from time into eternity, And we are going to become One with our Theophany, We're going to live in that mansion God has prepared for me, We're going to leave This old pest-house for eternity.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We're going to be reunited With our loved ones Who have gone on before To that other dimension; And soon we'll see Him face to face, The One who lives inside our hearts; Who saved us by His amazing grace, We'll be with Him never to depart.
